title.purpose: Modules, quiz options and compact panel titles.

body.purpose: Explanatory copy in short, concrete blocks.

label.purpose: Eyebrows, counters, progress labels and technical tags.

shadows.name: orange-hover-charge
shadows.purpose: Charged hover state on action controls.

shadows.name: quiet-structural-edge
shadows.purpose: Section separation without generic card shadow.

motion.name: feed-expo
motion.purpose: Primary tactile easing for reveal, lift and press states.

components.name: Hero Light CTA
components.description: Primary first-fold action, warm white at rest and orange on hover.
components.css: .ds-hero-cta { min-height: 58px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(244,245,240,.86); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0 10px 0 28px; background: #f4f5f0; color: #070707; font-family: Barlow, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 800; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 18px 46px rgba(0,0,0,.32), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.76); transition: background 180ms ease, border-color 180ms ease, color 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease, transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-hero-cta span { width: 40px; aspect-ratio: 1; display: grid; place-items: center; border-radius: 50%; background: #ffa300; color: #070707; } .ds-hero-cta:hover, .ds-hero-cta:focus-visible { border-color: #ffa300; background: #ffa300; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 20px 54px rgba(255,163,0,.26), 0 16px 44px rgba(0,0,0,.32); outline: none; } .ds-hero-cta:hover span, .ds-hero-cta:focus-visible span { background: #070707; color: #ffa300; } .ds-hero-cta:active { transform: translateY(1px) scale(.985); }

components.name: Quiz Primary Button
components.description: Orange diagnostic action for continuing or submitting quiz steps.
components.css: .ds-quiz-primary { min-height: 56px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px; border: 1px solid #ffa300; border-radius: 999px; padding: 0 28px; background: #ffa300; color: #070707; font-family: Barlow, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-weight: 900; cursor: pointer; transition: opacity 180ms ease, background 180ms ease, color 180ms ease, transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1), box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-quiz-primary:hover, .ds-quiz-primary:focus-visible { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 20px 44px rgba(255,163,0,.16); outline: none; } .ds-quiz-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px) scale(.985); } .ds-quiz-primary:disabled { opacity: .38; cursor: not-allowed; transform: none; box-shadow: none; }

components.name: Dark Input
components.description: Touch-friendly dark input with orange activated focus.
components.css: .ds-input-wrap { display: grid; gap: 10px; color: rgba(244,245,240,.72); font-family: Barlow, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; font-weight: 800; } .ds-input-wrap span { font-size: .84rem; text-transform: uppercase; color: #ffa300; } .ds-input { min-height: 64px; border: 1px solid rgba(244,245,240,.16); border-radius: 18px; padding: 0 18px; background: rgba(7,7,7,.72); color: #f4f5f0; font: inherit; font-size: 1.05rem; outline: 0; transition: border-color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease, box-shadow 180ms ease; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(255,163,0,.72); background: rgba(7,7,7,.88); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px rgba(255,163,0,.32); }

components.name: Quiz Option
components.description: Numbered selectable diagnostic answer with tactile orange state.
components.css: .ds-quiz-option { min-height: 80px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 42px 1fr 24px; align-items: center; gap: 18px; border: 1px solid rgba(244,245,240,.12); border-radius: 18px; padding: 14px 22px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(244,245,240,.045), rgba(244,245,240,.018)); color: #f4f5f0; font-family: Barlow, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 180ms ease, background 180ms ease, transform 180ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-quiz-option small { width: 42px; aspect-ratio: 1; display: grid; place-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(244,245,240,.12); border-radius: 10px; background: rgba(244,245,240,.055); font-weight: 900; } .ds-quiz-option span { display: grid; gap: 6px; } .ds-quiz-option strong { font-size: 1rem; } .ds-quiz-option em { color: rgba(244,245,240,.54); font-style: normal; font-size: .95rem; } .ds-quiz-option i { width: 20px; aspect-ratio: 1; justify-self: end; border: 1px solid rgba(244,245,240,.22); border-radius: 50%; } .ds-quiz-option:hover, .ds-quiz-option:focus-visible { border-color: rgba(255,163,0,.78); background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,163,0,.13), rgba(255,163,0,.035)); transform: translateY(-2px); outline: none; } .ds-quiz-option.is-selected small, .ds-quiz-option.is-selected i { border-color: #ffa300; background: #ffa300; color: #070707; }

components.name: Installed Module Row
components.description: Operational pillar row with number, title and hover translation.
components.html:
01

Clareza

Organizar oferta, posicionamento e mensagem para explicar valor sem improviso.
components.css: .ds-module-row { position: relative; min-height: 142px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 64px 1fr; column-gap: 26px; align-items: start; padding: 26px 30px 26px 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(244,245,240,.12); background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,163,0,.055), rgba(244,245,240,.025) 46%, rgba(244,245,240,.012)), rgba(244,245,240,.018); color: #f4f5f0; font-family: Barlow, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; transition: background 220ms ease, border-color 220ms ease, transform 260ms cubic-bezier(.16,1,.3,1); } .ds-module-row span { color: #ffa300; font-weight: 900; } .ds-module-row h3 { margin: 0; color: #f4f5f0; font-size: clamp(1.55rem,2.1vw,2.55rem); line-height: .96; } .ds-module-row p { max-width: 520px; margin: 16px 0 0; color: rgba(244,245,240,.7); line-height: 1.42; } .ds-module-row:hover { border-color: rgba(255,163,0,.46); background: linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(255,163,0,.14), rgba(255,163,0,.04) 42%, rgba(244,245,240,.025)), rgba(244,245,240,.034); transform: translateX(-12px); } .ds-module-row:hover h3 { color: #ffa300; }

components.name: Dark Diagnostic Panel
components.description: Immersive modal panel with warm border, ambient shadow and internal glow.
components.html:
Diagnostico Feed

O que faria mais diferenca agora?

Escolha os ganhos que voce quer destravar primeiro.
components.css: .ds-panel { position: relative; overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid rgba(244,245,240,.14); border-radius: 30px; padding: clamp(30px,5vw,56px); background: radial-gradient(circle at 12% 8%, rgba(255,163,0,.13), transparent 20rem), linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(244,245,240,.05), transparent 46%), rgba(13,13,12,.94); color: #f4f5f0; font-family: Barlow, Arial, Helvetica, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 36px 120px rgba(0,0,0,.48), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(244,245,240,.1); } .ds-panel::before { content: ""; position: absolute; inset: 0; background: radial-gradient(circle, rgba(244,245,240,.13) 0 .65px, transparent .85px) 0 0 / 5px 5px, linear-gradient(116deg, transparent 0 51%, rgba(255,163,0,.1) 51.08% 51.18%, transparent 51.28%); opacity: .22; pointer-events: none; } .ds-panel > * { position: relative; z-index: 1; } .ds-eyebrow { width: max-content; min-height: 32px; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border: 1px solid rgba(255,163,0,.5); border-radius: 999px; padding: 0 14px; color: #ffa300; background: rgba(255,163,0,.08); font-size: .78rem; font-weight: 900; text-transform: uppercase; } .ds-panel h2 { max-width: 760px; margin: 18px 0 0; font-size: clamp(2.25rem,4.4vw,4.25rem); line-height: 1; } .ds-panel p:last-child { max-width: 640px; color: rgba(244,245,240,.64); font-size: clamp(1rem,1.5vw,1.18rem); line-height: 1.45; }

narrative.overview:
The Feed system should feel like an operating layer switching on: dark, graphic, immediate, and responsive to touch. It is not a polite agency website. It is a brand surface for a pragmatic, dynamic and precise company that turns loose knowledge into working systems.

The visual language is a premium operational collage: black fields, warm white type, orange decisions, technical blue in small doses, thin grids, live waves, numbered modules, dense interaction states and high-contrast calls to action. Motion and canvas effects are part of the brand, but they must always support clarity and conversion.
keyCharacteristics: Dark operating-room atmosphere anchored in Feed black, not generic tech dark mode.
Orange is the decision color: action, active state, progress, selection and emphasis.
Barlow carries the whole system through extreme scale contrast instead of font mixing.
Surfaces feel tactile through borders, glows, inset highlights, pointer response and scroll reveal.
Mobile is not a downgrade: buttons, quiz choices and canvas feedback must feel made for touch.

rules.name: The Orange Decides Rule
rules.body: Orange marks the moment of action or selection. If everything is orange, nothing is decisive.

rules.name: The No Generic AI Color Rule
rules.body: Purple gradients, random neon blues and "tech AI" palettes are forbidden. Blue exists only as a precise technical support signal.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never use pure `#000` or pure `#fff` in new UI. Feed black and Feed white carry the brand temperature.

rules.name: The Single Family, Hard Contrast Rule
rules.body: Do not add a second font to create personality. Push Barlow through scale, weight and layout first.

rules.name: The Short Claim Rule
rules.body: Large type must say less. If a headline needs a paragraph to work, rewrite the idea.

rules.name: The Equipment Light Rule
rules.body: Use shadows to make controls feel touchable or panels feel present. Do not use soft generic card shadows as decoration.

rules.name: The Border Before Shadow Rule
rules.body: For normal content modules, use borders, grids and tonal shifts before reaching for elevation.

dos: Do use Feed black, Feed white and Feed orange as the core palette.
Do make action states tactile: hover lift, active press, orange selection, visible progress.
Do keep the web and mobile experience equally intentional, especially the hero CTA and quiz.
Do use grids, thin lines, numbering and layered operational visuals to show systems being built.
Do keep IA concrete: pages, fluxos, assistentes, materiais comerciais, diagnosticos and systems that enter real work.
Do preserve `prefers-reduced-motion` and keep canvas-heavy effects performance-aware.
donts: Don't use templates genericos de IA.
Don't use roxo/azul neon as the default AI palette.
Don't make promessas milagrosas about IA.
Don't drift into visual corporativo frio.
Don't add excesso de efeitos sem funcao.
Don't use linguagem burocratica or textos com cara automatica.
Don't build layouts previsiveis demais, especially repeated text-left/image-right sections.
Don't create cards repetidos sem hierarquia.
Don't use imagens bonitas que nao ajudam a entender a operacao.
Don't add side-stripe borders, gradient text, decorative glassmorphism or repeated icon-card grids.
